title: Object Byte Extent (0x57)
description: Object Byte Extent triplet layout. Length and TID are not mapped here; payload starts at offset 2.

elements.name: ByteExt
elements.description: Byte extent of object (low-order 4 bytes, unsigned binary, big-endian).

elements.name: BytExtHi
elements.description: High-order bytes of the byte extent (unsigned binary, big-endian). Optional; present when triplet length is 10.

notes: TID for this triplet is X'57'. Length field (offset 0) and TID (offset 1) are intentionally not mapped per instructions.
